name: firevision-iptv
description: Server for FireVisionIPTV - Manages channel lists and app updates

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @firevision/backend" "npm run dev -w @firevision/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @firevision/shared && npm run build -w @firevision/backend && npm run build -w @firevision/frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w @firevision/shared && npm run build -w @firevision/backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @firevision/backend && npm run test -w @firevision/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @firevision/shared && npm run typecheck -w @firevision/backend

author: CADnative
